name: Workshop Destination Automation - AI Assistant
postCreateCommand:
echo '
===========================================
Welcome to Workshop Destination Automation
===========================================

This devcontainer is configured for AI-assisted operations using:
  - GitHub Copilot for AI assistance
  - Ansible MCP Server for automation
  - dtctl for Dynatrace operations

To configure your environment, run:
  .devcontainer/setup.sh

This will prompt you for:
  - Dynatrace environment URL and API token
  - Ansible Automation Platform (AAP) MCP server hostname and bearer token

===========================================
'
